name: Full link stress test
description: Build a complete CCE end-to-end traffic path from k6 client through ELB to nginx-ingress to workload pods. Support short-connection, keepalive, and ramp traffic models. Collect ELB metrics and AOM observability, evaluate elasticity phases, and generate bilingual Markdown and HTML reports with performance curves.

tools.name: huawei_deploy_cce_pressure_test_java_sample
tools.description: Run huawei_deploy_cce_pressure_test_java_sample through the shared Huawei Cloud dispatcher.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.
